name: Barchetta Endivia Belga e Taleggio (Endive & Taleggio Boats
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb BC Smoked Salmon, thin sliced
15 Prosciutto or bresaola - cured beef slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully remove endive leaves: rinse and dry carefully.
2. Salmon boats:
a. Place a slice of salmon on the endive leaf.
b. Remove the outer skin of the Taleggio cheese and leave half for another combination.
c. Gently blend the Taleggio with fennel leaves.
d. Drizzle a little extra virgin olive oil on the salmon and grind pepper.
e. Place a spoonful of Taleggio on top and serve.
3. Bresaola boats:
a. Place a slice of bresaola or prosciutto on the endive.
b. Place a strip of roasted red pepper on top, drizzle with extra virgin olive oil, and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
c. Gently mix sun-dried tomatoes into the cheese.
d. Place a spoonful on top of the "boat" (endive) and serve.
4. If unable to locate Taleggio cheese, use goat's cheese.
